subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Aqa Ghulam-'Ali: your labours have been manifold; now that 'Abdu'l-Bahá hath returned to the East, they have increased even more [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا غلامعلی زحمات شما بسیار بود حال که عبدالبهاء بشرق مراجعت کرد بیشتر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @eulogies; reminiscences
